title: Dry Bulk Market On Solid Footing
section_path: Dry Bulk Market On Solid Footing
section_path_text: Dry Bulk Market On Solid Footing
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
With the new year fast approaching, it is encouraging - and not surprising - that the dry bulk market finds itself on solid footing. Capesize rates ended last week up year-on-year by 236%, panamax rates up by 37%, supramax rates up by 29%, and handysize rates up by 27%. Fleet growth remains moderate and manageable.
